info.english_meaning: to kill to destroy to irritate to cause pain

upasargachandrika.example_text: 'upahiMsanti cAnyonyaM pralumpanti parasparam' (mAtsya pu0 14466) upahiMsanti vyatihiMsanti vyatiGnanti sampraharante
